title: Bubble Gun for Kids, Bubble Gun with Bubble Solution, Bubble Blaster Toy 5000+ Bubbles Per Min Bubble Maker Outdoor Toys for Girls Party
features: 🎁 【Colorful LED Lights】The LED lights on the kids bubble gun make the colors of the bubbles more colorful. Moreover, can produce 5,000+ rich bubbles per minute. Not only can you see colorful bubbles during the day, but you can also see colorful bubbles in the dark night, bringing unlimited fun to children

🎁【Bubble Gun for Kids】The Automatic bubble gun is very popular among kids and their followers. As a must-have tool for dating, birthday party, stage, wedding, Christmas and more. This is the perfect prop for a photo. Perfect for you to shoot videos to upload to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, it's the best props for entertainment and decoration.

🎁【Rich Accessories】The bubble gun set includes 1 bubble gun, 1 bottles of bubble liquid, don't worry about not enough bubble liquid. Let you have fun. bubble tray and rechargeable battery.The bubble gun also requires 4 AAA batteries (not included), which you can easily replace.

🎁【High-quality anti-fall material】The bubble gun is made of high-quality ABS material, with rechargeable battery, environmentally friendly, durable, safe to use, no sharp edges, thickened shell and anti-fall, so that children can play with more peace of mind, very suitable for Children play and entertain as well as adults.

🎁【BEST GIFT FOR KIDS】The bubble gun can shoot a lot of colorful bubbles. Great fun for the kids, or romantic for a party. Ideal gift choice for boys and girls. Bring endless fun and joy to your little ones in a fun and loving way. Perfect bubble gun for backyard, patio, lawn, park, picnic. Enjoy good bath time and summer time.
